hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"⚠️ MANDATORY SESSION START — READ ALL OF THESE BEFORE DOING ANYTHING ELSE:

[1] WORKFLOW: docs/WORKFLOW.md — execution model (ENGAGE+PLAN+PERFORMING+ADJOURNING)
[2] STATE: docs/os/SESSION.md — global in-flight state
[3] FEEDBACK: docs/memory/feedback.md — CRITICAL rules (routing, approval gate, never-again)
[4] MARCUS: agent-department/CEO/marcus/MEMORY.md — triple-pass self-critique + personality
[5] OS SKILL: agent-department/shared/skills/coding/01-karpathy.md — coding rules
[6] OS SKILL: agent-department/shared/skills/agents/01-memory.md — memory rules
[7] OS SKILL: agent-department/shared/skills/operating-system/session-protocol/SKILL.md
[8] OS SKILL: agent-department/shared/skills/operating-system/reflection-protocol/SKILL.md

RULES (non-negotiable):
- For EVERY task: run ENGAGE+PLAN in full format (Intent/Venture/Team/Memory check/Design check/One unknown/Critique check/Plan/Done condition)
- WAIT for user approval (Awaiting your go-ahead) before PERFORMING
- Triple-pass runs internally before every plan or strategic output (Pass1 Generate → Pass2 Critique → Pass3 Fix)
- Build check (npx tsc --noEmit) after every TypeScript change before ADJOURNING
- ADJOURNING required for any session with 3+ tool calls"}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Loading mandatory OS skills and session rules...

hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
